summary: Project DNA is an AI-powered architectural governance platform that preserves the technical and business knowledge of software projects. It operates as a CLI tool that scans repositories and uses AI to generate a persistent, local knowledge base, enabling AI coding assistants to understand the project deeply.
goals: Preserve architectural context and business intent.
Reduce AI hallucinations and architectural inconsistencies.
Provide a persistent knowledge layer for AI interactions.
Maintain a local-first, version-controllable architectural memory.
